items.title: ShopBD
items.short_description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with RBAC, payments, and a mobile app.
items.description: ShopBD is a complete e-commerce system built with Laravel and a React Native (Expo) mobile app. It handles everything from product variants and role-based admin access to real payments and push notifications — designed to be a real production-ready store, not a demo.
features: Role-based access control with Spatie permissions
Sanctum-secured REST API for the mobile app
Product variants (size, color, stock per variant)
FCM push notifications for order updates

items.title: Learnify LMS
items.short_description: A Laravel 11 learning management system with a custom design identity.
items.description: Learnify is a full learning management system — courses, modules, video lessons, wishlists, and notifications — wrapped in a custom terracotta-and-teal visual identity so it doesn't feel like a generic LMS template.

items.title: Expo E-commerce
items.short_description: React Native storefront with a Node/Express/MongoDB backend.
items.description: A three-part e-commerce system: a Node/Express/MongoDB backend, a React admin panel, and an Expo React Native mobile app — using Clerk for auth, Stripe for payments, and Cloudinary for media.

items.title: Adopte Consultant
items.short_description: Animated marketing landing page with SVG wave sections.
items.description: A pixel-accurate marketing site built from client design references, featuring layered SVG wave dividers, scroll-based reveals, and a fully responsive layout.
